repair_summary: Replaced generic hardcoded Hyperliquid fetch API with five parameterized read-only methods; added Ethereum address/coin/time-range validation; separated SDK vs raw HTTP provenance reporting; embedded AdapterHealth in every AdapterResult; added CCXT bounded timeout/kwargs/normalized dicts; separated HTTPX connect/read/write/pool timeouts; fixed CCXT capability mapping (camelCase has key vs snake_case method name).
forbidden_capability_scan: PASS (verified no wallet/exchange/signing/order imports in adapter code)

previous_live_probes.note: R03/R04 earlier probes preserved for reference. R04 used SYNTHETIC_KEYS address incorrectly labeled as public watchlist — corrected in R05 with real whitelist address from get_whitelist().
previous_live_probes.r04_synthetic_keys_correction: watchlist_clearinghouse_probe from R04 removed — address was SYNTHETIC_KEYS, not public watchlist

validation_coverage.ethereum_address_format: tested — valid hex, mixed-case, empty, short, no-prefix, non-string cases
validation_coverage.integer_time_range: tested — valid range, negative start/end, start>end, equal, non-integer

mocked_test_coverage.fetch_clearinghouse_state: valid address + invalid address + SDK fallback tests
mocked_test_coverage.fetch_funding_history: empty coin, negative start, start>end, valid with/without end, SDK fallback

ccxt_improvements.operation_kwargs: kwargs passed to ticker/OI/funding_rate; OHLCV uses positional timeframe/limit
ccxt_improvements.normalized_dicts: ticker, OHLCV, OI, funding rate each normalized to stable adapter-owned dicts
ccxt_improvements.raw_preserved: raw CCXT data preserved as _raw key inside each normalized record
ccxt_improvements.capability_mapping: explicit OPERATION_MAP separates method_name (snake_case) from capability_key (camelCase); _check_capability validates method exists AND has[key] is true/'emulated'; false/None/missing → unsupported_capability

known_limitations: Hyperliquid SDK Info(skip_ws=True) requires websocket dependency — may fail in minimal environments (unchanged from baseline)
CCXT 4.5.59 shadows import when ccxt subpackage exists in project (unchanged from baseline)
Only 3 exchanges in allowlist (binance, okx, bybit) (unchanged from baseline)
AdapterHealth uses __post_init__ auto-population — health is present on all AdapterResult instances
clean_status: All 86 unit tests pass (0 failed, 0 skipped). Live probes: CCXT Binance BTC/USDT ticker OK (last=65831.99, provenance=ccxt, health_available=true); whitelist clearinghouseState OK (1 real position found, address from get_whitelist()); Hyperliquid SDK allMids OK (866 assets). data_mode=live. No wallet/exchange/signing/order imports. No zero-address or BTC hardcoding.
